landing.subtitle: Luxury culinary planning for an unforgettable catamaran experience.

auth.title: Welcome aboard
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password to continue.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join us and start planning your voyage.
auth.switchToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

auth.signUpSuccess: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.

errors.profileNotFound: Your account profile could not be loaded. Contact support.

dashboard.title: Your Voyage
dashboard.subtitle: Plan and manage your catamaran experience.
dashboard.noTrip: You don't have an active reservation yet.

details.title: Trip details
details.subtitle: Tell us about your party so we can craft the perfect experience.
details.crewNote: Crew count adjusts automatically for larger parties.
details.datesRequired: Please select start and end dates to continue.
details.datesInvalidOrder: Please select valid dates (start date must be before end date).
details.adultsRequired: At least one adult is required on board.

menu.title: Menu & pricing
menu.subtitle: Choose your culinary journey. Every detail matters.
menu.noDates: Select valid dates in step 1 to generate the itinerary.
menu.kidsMenuLabel: How many kids menus for this meal?
menu.kidsMenuValidationHint: Please complete the kids menu configuration for every meal with kids menus requested.
menu.surpriseNote: Our chef will curate a surprise menu tailored to your party.
menu.customNote: Tell us your vision — the chef will design a fully custom menu.
menu.customPlaceholder: Describe your ideal menu idea here…
menu.offSeasonNote: Note: Selecting menus outside the current season may incur additional costs for imported ingredients.

preferences.globalMealsHint: If meal times and abundance are not specified, they will be left to the Chef's discretion.
preferences.title: Preferences & restrictions
preferences.subtitle: Each guest card is saved independently for our chef.
preferences.noParticipants: Complete trip details first to add guests.
preferences.validationHint: Please select a restriction or 'No dietary restrictions' for all guests.

bar.title: Bar & beverages
bar.subtitle: Stock base is included — you are only charged for what is consumed.
bar.stockBanner: Help yourself freely from the onboard stock. Consumption will be tracked and billed at the end of your trip.
bar.baseStockWaters: Natural and mineral water (Bonafont, Evian, Fiji, Topo Chico, Perrier, San Pellegrino).
bar.baseStockSodas: Regular and diet soft drinks (Coca Cola, Sprite, Fanta, Ginger Ale, Coca Light, Coca Zero, Sprite Zero).
bar.specificRequestLabel: Would you like any specific brand or beverage not on our list?
bar.specificRequestPlaceholder: e.g. Fanta, a specific tequila brand…
bar.residualStockEmpty: No residual stock registered at this time.
bar.byob: I will bring my own bottles
bar.chefDefaultHelp: If quantity or brand is not specified, it will be left to the Chef's discretion.

snacks.title: Snacks & complements
snacks.subtitle: Select what to buy and what should always be onboard.
